PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?president ?presidentLabel(AVG(?gdp) AS ?avgGDP)(AVG(?deficit) AS ?avgDeficit)(AVG(?debt) AS ?avgDebt) WHERE {
  ?president p:P39 ?term ; rdfs:label ?presidentLabel .
  ?term ps:P39 wd:Q11685 ; pq:P580 ?startDate ; pq:P582 ?endDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?startDate) >= 1993)
  wd:Q30 p:P2131 [ ps:P2131 ?gdp ; pq:P585 ?year ] .
  wd:Q30 p:P4152 [ ps:P4152 ?deficit ; pq:P585 ?year ] .
  wd:Q30 p:P2133 [ ps:P2133 ?debt ; pq:P585 ?year ] .
  FILTER(YEAR(?year) >= YEAR(?startDate))
  FILTER(YEAR(?year) <= YEAR(?endDate))
}
GROUP BY ?president ?presidentLabel

best_attempt.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?president ?presidentLabel (AVG(?gdp) AS ?avgGDP) (AVG(?deficit) AS ?avgDeficit) (AVG(?debt) AS ?avgDebt)
WHERE {
  ?president p:P39 ?term;
    rdfs:label ?presidentLabel.
  ?term ps:P39 wd:Q11685;
         pq:P580 ?startDate;
         pq:P582 ?endDate.
  FILTER (YEAR(?startDate) >= 1993)

  wd:Q30 p:P2131 [ ps:P2131 ?gdp; pq:P585 ?year ].
  wd:Q30 p:P4152 [ ps:P4152 ?deficit; pq:P585 ?year ].
  wd:Q30 p:P2133 [ ps:P2133 ?debt; pq:P585 ?year ].

  FILTER (YEAR(?year) >= YEAR(?startDate))
  FILTER (YEAR(?year) <= YEAR(?endDate))
}
GROUP BY ?president ?presidentLabel
